requirement_topic.en: TNB Distribution Grid-Connection Standards — Anti-Islanding (IEC 62116), IEC 61727, and 50 Hz / 240 V / 415 V Settings
requirement_topic.zh: TNB配电并网标准——防孤岛（IEC 62116）、IEC 61727及50 Hz / 240 V / 415 V参数
requirement_topic.zht: TNB配電併網標準——防孤島（IEC 62116）、IEC 61727及50 Hz / 240 V / 415 V參數

summary.en: In Malaysia, PV inverters connected to Tenaga Nasional Berhad (TNB)'s distribution network must comply with TNB's Distribution Code and applicable technical connection conditions. Key grid-connection requirements for PV inverters include: (1) IEC 62116 anti-islanding test — the inverter must detect loss of mains and disconnect within specified time limits; (2) IEC 61727 (Photovoltaic systems — Characteristics of the utility interface) specifying voltage and frequency operating windows and protection requirements; (3) IEC 61000-3-2 harmonic current emission limits; (4) EN 50530 or equivalent overall efficiency test evidence. Malaysia's grid operates at 50 Hz, single-phase 240 V ±6%, three-phase 415 V ±6%. For rooftop solar under SEDA's Net Energy Metering (NEM) scheme, the inverter must meet TNB connection technical requirements as a condition of NEM application approval. Firmware and protection relay settings must be validated for Malaysia's 240/415 V, 50 Hz grid — not the 220/380 V settings applicable in China under GB/T 156. Confirm the current version of TNB's technical connection conditions directly with TNB or the Distribution Licensee before project finalisation.
summary.zh: 在马来西亚，接入国家能源公司（Tenaga Nasional Berhad / TNB）配电网的光伏逆变器须符合TNB《配电规范》及适用的技术接入条件。光伏逆变器并网的主要要求包括：（1）IEC 62116防孤岛测试——逆变器须在规定时限内检测电网失电并断开；（2）IEC 61727（光伏系统——电网接口特性），规定电压和频率运行范围及保护要求；（3）IEC 61000-3-2谐波电流排放限值；（4）EN 50530或等效的整体效率测试证据。马来西亚电网运行参数为50 Hz、单相240 V ±6%、三相415 V ±6%。在SEDA净电量计量（NEM）计划下的屋顶太阳能须满足TNB接入技术要求，作为NEM申请批准的条件。固件和保护继电器整定须针对马来西亚240/415 V、50 Hz电网参数进行验证，而非适用于中国的220/380 V参数（依据GB/T 156）。项目最终确定前请直接向TNB或配电许可方核实TNB技术接入条件的现行版本。
summary.zht: 在馬來西亞，接入國家能源公司（Tenaga Nasional Berhad / TNB）配電網的光伏逆變器須符合TNB《配電規範》及適用的技術接入條件。光伏逆變器併網的主要要求包括：（1）IEC 62116防孤島測試——逆變器須在規定時限內偵測電網失電並斷開；（2）IEC 61727（光伏系統——電網介面特性），規定電壓和頻率運行範圍及保護要求；（3）IEC 61000-3-2諧波電流排放限值；（4）EN 50530或等效的整體效率測試證據。馬來西亞電網運行參數為50 Hz、單相240 V ±6%、三相415 V ±6%。在SEDA淨電量計量（NEM）計畫下的屋頂太陽能須滿足TNB接入技術要求，作為NEM申請批准的條件。韌體和保護繼電器整定須針對馬來西亞240/415 V、50 Hz電網參數進行驗證，而非適用於中國的220/380 V參數（依據GB/T 156）。項目最終確定前請直接向TNB或配電許可方核實TNB技術接入條件的現行版本。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62116 — Utility-interconnected photovoltaic inverters — Test procedure of islanding prevention measures (required for Malaysia NEM/grid-connection)
IEC 61727 — Photovoltaic (PV) systems — Characteristics of the utility interface (Malaysia grid-connection reference)
IEC 61000-3-2 — Electromagnetic compatibility — Limits for harmonic current emissions (equipment with input current up to 16 A per phase)
EN 50530 — Overall efficiency of grid-connected photovoltaic inverters
TNB Distribution Code — technical connection conditions for distributed generation in Malaysia
SEDA Malaysia — Net Energy Metering (NEM) scheme technical requirements

summary.en: Chinese grid-connection evidence commonly includes GB/T 19964-2024 (Technical Requirements for Connecting Photovoltaic Power Station to Power System, applicable to utility-scale PV via 10 kV and above), NB/T 32004-2018 (inverter technical specifications), GB/T 37408-2019 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters), and domestic anti-islanding test results under Chinese conditions. These Chinese grid-connection documents are based on Chinese grid conditions (220/380 V, 50 Hz) and are not accepted as Malaysian TNB or SEDA NEM grid-connection evidence. The key parameter difference is voltage: China's standard is 220/380 V under GB/T 156, whereas Malaysia TNB specifies 240/415 V at 50 Hz. Firmware protection thresholds validated for Chinese grid conditions must be re-parameterised and retested for Malaysia TNB grid conditions.
summary.zh: 中国并网证据通常包括GB/T 19964-2024（光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定，适用于通过10 kV及以上接入的大型光伏电站）、NB/T 32004-2018（逆变器技术规范）、GB/T 37408-2019（光伏并网逆变器技术要求）及中国条件下的国内防孤岛测试结果。上述中国并网文件基于中国电网条件（220/380 V、50 Hz），不被马来西亚TNB或SEDA NEM接受为并网证据。主要参数差异在于电压：中国标准依据GB/T 156为220/380 V，而马来西亚TNB规定为50 Hz下的240/415 V。针对中国电网条件验证的固件保护阈值须重新针对马来西亚TNB电网条件设置参数并重新测试。
summary.zht: 中國併網證據通常包括GB/T 19964-2024（光伏發電站接入電力系統技術規定，適用於通過10 kV及以上接入的大型光伏電站）、NB/T 32004-2018（逆變器技術規範）、GB/T 37408-2019（光伏並網逆變器技術要求）及中國條件下的國內防孤島測試結果。上述中國併網文件基於中國電網條件（220/380 V、50 Hz），不被馬來西亞TNB或SEDA NEM接受為併網證據。主要參數差異在於電壓：中國標準依據GB/T 156為220/380 V，而馬來西亞TNB規定為50 Hz下的240/415 V。針對中國電網條件驗證的韌體保護閾值須重新針對馬來西亞TNB電網條件設置參數並重新測試。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 19964-2024 — 光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定 (Technical Requirements for Connecting Photovoltaic Power Station to Power System)
NB/T 32004-2018 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
GB/T 37408-2019 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)

gap.en: Gap: Chinese GB/T grid-connection documents do not satisfy TNB Distribution Code or SEDA NEM technical requirements for Malaysia. Exporters must prepare: (a) IEC 62116 anti-islanding test report from an ILAC-accredited laboratory; (b) IEC 61727 compliance evidence covering Malaysia's 240/415 V, 50 Hz operating window; (c) IEC 61000-3-2 harmonic emission compliance evidence; (d) EN 50530 or equivalent efficiency test data; (e) firmware validation documentation confirming protection thresholds are set for Malaysia's 240/415 V, 50 Hz grid — not China's 220/380 V parameters. Where inverter firmware settings are changed from the China factory default, re-parameterisation must be documented and, if material to safety or anti-islanding function, retested under the applicable IEC standard. Confirm current TNB technical connection conditions and SEDA NEM inverter equipment requirements directly with TNB and SEDA before project commitment.
gap.zh: 差距：中国GB/T并网文件不满足马来西亚TNB《配电规范》或SEDA NEM技术要求。出口商须准备：（a）来自ILAC认可实验室的IEC 62116防孤岛测试报告；（b）涵盖马来西亚240/415 V、50 Hz运行范围的IEC 61727合规证据；（c）IEC 61000-3-2谐波排放合规证据；（d）EN 50530或等效的效率测试数据；（e）确认保护阈值针对马来西亚240/415 V、50 Hz电网（而非中国220/380 V参数）设置的固件验证文件。若逆变器固件设置与中国出厂默认设置不同，须记录重新参数化过程，如对安全或防孤岛功能有重要影响，应依据适用IEC标准重新测试。在项目确定前请直接向TNB和SEDA确认TNB技术接入条件及SEDA NEM逆变器设备要求的现行版本。
gap.zht: 差距：中國GB/T併網文件不滿足馬來西亞TNB《配電規範》或SEDA NEM技術要求。出口商須準備：（a）來自ILAC認可實驗室的IEC 62116防孤島測試報告；（b）涵蓋馬來西亞240/415 V、50 Hz運行範圍的IEC 61727合規證據；（c）IEC 61000-3-2諧波排放合規證據；（d）EN 50530或等效的效率測試數據；（e）確認保護閾值針對馬來西亞240/415 V、50 Hz電網（而非中國220/380 V參數）設置的韌體驗證文件。若逆變器韌體設置與中國出廠預設設置不同，須記錄重新參數化過程，如對安全或防孤島功能有重要影響，應依據適用IEC標準重新測試。在項目確定前請直接向TNB和SEDA確認TNB技術接入條件及SEDA NEM逆變器設備要求的現行版本。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for grid connection under TNB Distribution Code and mandatory in practice for SEDA NEM scheme participation; anti-islanding and voltage/frequency operating window compliance are non-negotiable technical gates
mandatory_status.cn: Chinese grid-connection evidence satisfies China grid operator requirements but does not transfer to Malaysian TNB grid-connection or SEDA NEM scheme acceptance

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] TNB's grid-connection technical conditions and SEDA NEM requirements mandate IEC 62116 anti-islanding, IEC 61727 interface compliance, and IEC 61000-3-2 harmonic evidence — none of which is covered by Chinese GB/T grid certificates. Re-parameterise inverter firmware for Malaysia's 240/415 V at 50 Hz grid before testing and document the configuration. Confirm current TNB technical connection conditions, SEDA NEM inverter equipment eligibility criteria, and any TNB supplementary connection requirements directly with TNB and SEDA before finalising the equipment compliance package.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] TNB并网技术条件和SEDA NEM要求规定了IEC 62116防孤岛、IEC 61727接口合规和IEC 61000-3-2谐波证据——上述均未被中国GB/T并网证书覆盖。测试前须将逆变器固件重新参数化为马来西亚240/415 V 50 Hz电网参数，并记录配置。在最终确定设备合规包前，请直接向TNB和SEDA核实TNB技术接入条件的现行版本、SEDA NEM逆变器设备资格标准及任何TNB补充接入要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] TNB併網技術條件和SEDA NEM要求規定了IEC 62116防孤島、IEC 61727介面合規和IEC 61000-3-2諧波證據——上述均未被中國GB/T併網證書覆蓋。測試前須將逆變器韌體重新參數化為馬來西亞240/415 V 50 Hz電網參數，並記錄配置。在最終確定設備合規包前，請直接向TNB和SEDA核實TNB技術接入條件的現行版本、SEDA NEM逆變器設備資格標準及任何TNB補充接入要求。

requirement_topic.en: SEDA Malaysia Net Energy Metering (NEM) Scheme — Distributed Solar Equipment and Application Requirements
requirement_topic.zh: SEDA马来西亚净电量计量（NEM）计划——分布式太阳能设备和申请要求
requirement_topic.zht: SEDA馬來西亞淨電量計量（NEM）計畫——分散式太陽能設備和申請要求

summary.en: SEDA Malaysia administers the Net Energy Metering (NEM) scheme for distributed rooftop solar PV under the Renewable Energy Act 2011 (Act 725) and the Feed-in Tariff and Net Energy Metering Regulations. NEM allows residential and commercial consumers to offset electricity bills by exporting surplus solar generation to the grid at a retail-rate offset. Key NEM requirements affecting PV inverters include: (a) the installation must be carried out by a SEDA-registered contractor; (b) the inverter must meet TNB's technical connection requirements, including anti-islanding per IEC 62116 and interface requirements per IEC 61727; (c) a TNB-approved net meter is installed; (d) ST Certificate of Approval (CoA) for the inverter as a regulated electrical equipment item under the Electrical Supply Act 1990. Chinese PV inverters supplied to Malaysian NEM projects must hold ST CoA and satisfy TNB technical connection conditions as a prerequisite for NEM registration and grid connection.
summary.zh: SEDA马来西亚根据《2011年可再生能源法》（法令725）及上网电价和净电量计量法规，管理分布式屋顶太阳能光伏的净电量计量（NEM）计划。NEM允许住宅和商业用户通过以零售费率向电网输出多余太阳能发电量来抵消电费。影响光伏逆变器的NEM主要要求包括：（a）安装须由SEDA注册承包商进行；（b）逆变器须满足TNB技术接入要求，包括依据IEC 62116的防孤岛及依据IEC 61727的接口要求；（c）安装TNB认可的净电量计量电表；（d）逆变器作为《1990年电力供应法》下的受管制电气设备，须取得ST批准证书（CoA）。供应至马来西亚NEM项目的中国光伏逆变器须持有ST CoA并满足TNB技术接入条件，作为NEM注册和并网的前提条件。
summary.zht: SEDA馬來西亞根據《2011年可再生能源法》（法令725）及上網電價和淨電量計量法規，管理分散式屋頂太陽能光伏的淨電量計量（NEM）計畫。NEM允許住宅和商業用戶通過以零售費率向電網輸出多餘太陽能發電量來抵消電費。影響光伏逆變器的NEM主要要求包括：（a）安裝須由SEDA註冊承包商進行；（b）逆變器須滿足TNB技術接入要求，包括依據IEC 62116的防孤島及依據IEC 61727的介面要求；（c）安裝TNB認可的淨電量計量電表；（d）逆變器作為《1990年電力供應法》下的受管制電氣設備，須取得ST批准證書（CoA）。供應至馬來西亞NEM項目的中國光伏逆變器須持有ST CoA並滿足TNB技術接入條件，作為NEM登記和併網的前提條件。

standards_or_laws: Renewable Energy Act 2011 (Act 725) — Malaysia, governing SEDA's NEM scheme administration
SEDA Malaysia Net Energy Metering Scheme — application and equipment requirements for distributed rooftop solar PV
Electrical Supply Act 1990 (Act 447) — Malaysia, requiring Certificate of Approval for regulated electrical equipment including PV inverters
TNB Distribution Code — technical connection conditions for distributed generation (NEM) in Malaysia
IEC 62116 — anti-islanding test (required for TNB NEM grid connection)
IEC 61727 — Photovoltaic systems — Characteristics of the utility interface (required for TNB NEM grid connection)

summary.en: China does not have a direct equivalent programme. Distributed solar grid connection in China is governed by National Energy Administration (NEA) distributed PV policies and grid operator (State Grid, Southern Power Grid) connection rules, which reference China's domestic standards (NB/T 32004, GB/T 37408, GB/T 19964-2024). These Chinese distributed solar connection approvals and policies are not applicable in Malaysia and do not confer any presumption of compliance with ST CoA, SEDA NEM requirements, or TNB technical connection conditions.
summary.zh: 中国没有直接对应的计划。中国分布式太阳能并网受国家能源局（NEA）分布式光伏政策及电网运营商（国家电网、南方电网）接入规则管理，引用中国国内标准（NB/T 32004、GB/T 37408、GB/T 19964-2024）。上述中国分布式太阳能并网审批和政策不适用于马来西亚，不给予ST CoA、SEDA NEM要求或TNB技术接入条件的任何合规推定。
summary.zht: 中國沒有直接對應的計畫。中國分散式太陽能併網受國家能源局（NEA）分散式光伏政策及電網運營商（國家電網、南方電網）接入規則管理，引用中國國內標準（NB/T 32004、GB/T 37408、GB/T 19964-2024）。上述中國分散式太陽能併網審批和政策不適用於馬來西亞，不給予ST CoA、SEDA NEM要求或TNB技術接入條件的任何合規推定。

standards_or_laws: NB/T 32004-2018 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
GB/T 37408-2019 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
GB/T 19964-2024 — 光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定 (Technical Requirements for Connecting Photovoltaic Power Station to Power System)

gap.en: Gap: Chinese PV inverters for Malaysian NEM projects must hold a valid ST Certificate of Approval (CoA) and meet TNB technical connection conditions. Chinese NEA distributed PV approvals and domestic grid-connection test evidence do not transfer to Malaysia. Confirm ST CoA status, SEDA NEM inverter model eligibility, IEC safety and grid-connection test evidence, and SEDA-registered contractor requirements before committing product to Malaysian NEM projects.
gap.zh: 差距：用于马来西亚NEM项目的中国光伏逆变器须持有有效的ST批准证书（CoA）并满足TNB技术接入条件。中国NEA分布式光伏审批和国内并网测试证据不能转移至马来西亚。在将产品用于马来西亚NEM项目前，请确认ST CoA状态、SEDA NEM逆变器型号资格、IEC安全和并网测试证据及SEDA注册承包商要求。
gap.zht: 差距：用於馬來西亞NEM項目的中國光伏逆變器須持有有效的ST批准證書（CoA）並滿足TNB技術接入條件。中國NEA分散式光伏審批和國內併網測試證據不能轉移至馬來西亞。在將產品用於馬來西亞NEM項目前，請確認ST CoA狀態、SEDA NEM逆變器型號資格、IEC安全和併網測試證據及SEDA登記承包商要求。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory: ST Certificate of Approval required under Electrical Supply Act 1990 before supply or installation; SEDA NEM registration and TNB technical review are mandatory gates for NEM scheme participation
mandatory_status.cn: Chinese NEA distributed PV approvals are granted under China domestic policy — not transferable to Malaysia ST, SEDA, or TNB requirements

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] SEDA NEM participation and TNB grid connection for PV inverters in Malaysia require a ST Certificate of Approval and IEC-based compliance evidence — neither of which is fulfilled by Chinese domestic approvals. Confirm inverter model eligibility, ST CoA status, IEC 62116 and IEC 61727 compliance evidence, and SEDA-registered contractor status with SEDA and TNB before project submission. Verify current SEDA NEM scheme conditions and TNB technical connection requirements directly at seda.gov.my and tnb.com.my.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 马来西亚光伏逆变器参与SEDA NEM计划和TNB并网须取得ST批准证书及基于IEC的合规证据——中国国内审批均无法满足上述要求。在项目提交前，请向SEDA和TNB确认逆变器型号资格、ST CoA状态、IEC 62116和IEC 61727合规证据及SEDA注册承包商状态。请直接在seda.gov.my和tnb.com.my核实SEDA NEM计划的现行条件和TNB技术接入要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 馬來西亞光伏逆變器參與SEDA NEM計畫和TNB併網須取得ST批准證書及基於IEC的合規證據——中國國內審批均無法滿足上述要求。在項目提交前，請向SEDA和TNB確認逆變器型號資格、ST CoA狀態、IEC 62116和IEC 61727合規證據及SEDA登記承包商狀態。請直接在seda.gov.my和tnb.com.my核實SEDA NEM計畫的現行條件和TNB技術接入要求。
